config.name: triple_jitter
config.description: Experiment C: 20 seeds x 6 scenarios x 3 modes with TRIPLED stochastic-jitter sigmas (initial state sigma 0.15 vs 0.05, stressor delta sigma 0.36 vs 0.12, per-tick noise sigma 0.06 vs 0.02). Starts from the Paper #1 nominal operating point like Experiment B. Directly addresses the reviewer's concern that Cohen's d of 10-22 is suspicious and could indicate insufficient stochastic perturbation of the closed loop. If the significance pattern holds with effect sizes dropping to 3-5 (still very large by Cohen's conventions), the regulation finding is confirmed as a complete-separation effect, not a noise artifact.
